name: Old Age Pension (IGNOAPS)
full_name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
data_source: NSAP IGNOAPS scheme details from nsap.nic.in and myscheme.gov.in

rules.description: Applicant must be at least 60 years old
Applicant must be from a BPL household
rules.ambiguity_note: BPL status based on SECC/ration card — stale data may exclude genuinely poor applicants

rules.description: Must not receive any pension/financial assistance from any other source. Affidavit required.
rules.ambiguity_note: is_govt_employee used as proxy for receiving government pension — does not capture private pension or other assistance sources

rules.description: Must have Aadhaar for identity and DBT payment

required_documents.document: Age Proof (Birth/School Certificate or Medical Board)
Affidavit (no other pension) - attested by Judicial/Executive Magistrate

benefit_summary: ₹200/month central contribution (age 60-79), ₹500/month (age 80+). States add variable top-up.
name_hindi: इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्रीय वृद्धावस्था पेंशन योजना

application_offices.find_instruction: Your village Gram Panchayat. Ask your Sarpanch for help.
Block Development Office (BDO) in your block or tehsil

full_name_hindi: इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्रीय वृद्धावस्था पेंशन योजना
description: Monthly pension for senior citizens aged 60+ who are below the poverty line. Central government contributes ₹200/month (60–79 years) and ₹500/month (80+ years). Most states add a significant top-up, making total pensions ₹500–₹3,000+ depending on state. Pension is paid directly to bank/post office account.
description_hindi: 60 वर्ष या उससे अधिक उम्र के गरीबी रेखा से नीचे (BPL) के बुज़ुर्गों को हर महीने पेंशन मिलती है। केंद्र सरकार ₹200/माह (60–79 वर्ष) और ₹500/माह (80+ वर्ष) देती है। राज्य सरकार इसमें अपनी हिस्सेदारी जोड़ती है — कुल पेंशन ₹500 से ₹3,000+ हो सकती है। पेंशन सीधे बैंक खाते में आती है।
